name: shopify-admin
description: Shopify Admin GraphQL MCP tools for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Typed Shopify Admin tools for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Run Shopify Admin GraphQL actions from Codex with typed tools for products, orders, customers, inventory, discounts, webhooks, files, and more.
defaultPrompt: List recent Shopify orders and summarize issues.
Find products with low inventory and show variants.
Create a draft order for a customer.
